title: croton pendens
intro: Croton pendens, also known as the fire bush or fire tree, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The plant has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Croton pendens can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by using the plant's extracts in the form of capsules or tinctures.
